Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ninecloud City]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Ninecloud City is one of the largest cities in the world and serves as the capital of the Ninecloud country.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Ninecloud City contains an alley where the Monarch was found.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Ninecloud City is a collection of jewels spread out beneath the rose-tinted crystal roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Ninecloud City contains glistening structures and is the location of the Akura building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Ninecloud City features brightly colored and glowing towers and buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider has a guest tower in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ninecloud City holds celebrations during the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Ninecloud City has hangars for cloudships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Ninecloud City has many world-renowned entertainment venues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Ninecloud City has its own laws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The tree for the Heart-Piercer Fruit is located in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The restriction settled in an invisible column surrounding Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Ninecloud City is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Four Monarchs are bound to Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen was sent flying out of Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon and the others emerged in Ninecloud City.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Air travel away from Ninecloud City is currently restricted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Ninecloud City has records.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Ninecloud City is a location where Lindon and Yerin worked together.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Weeping Dragon was reported to be heading toward Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Ninecloud City is a location where Uncrowned King competitors have used towers.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Sha Miara is far from Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The crowd in the new world was less colorful than one might expect in Ninecloud City.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
